source.data:
@smoke @simple
Feature: Simple Test
  As a test engineer
  I want to run a simple test
  So that I can verify the framework is working

  Scenario: Simple passing test
    Given I have a simple test
    When I run the test
    Then it should pass

feature.name: Simple Test
feature.description:
As a test engineer
  I want to run a simple test
  So that I can verify the framework is working

pattern.source: I have a simple test
I run the test
it should pass
I am on the login page
I enter valid admin credentials
I enter valid user credentials
I enter username {string}
I enter password {string}
I leave the username field empty
I leave the password field empty
I click the login button
I check the remember me option
I click the {string} link
I click the {string} button
I enter email {string}
I login with credentials {string} and {string}
I should be redirected to the dashboard
I should see a welcome message
I should see an error message {string}
I should remain on the login page
the remember me cookie should be set
I should see validation errors
the login button should be disabled
I should see a username validation error
I should see a password validation error
I should be redirected to the password reset page
I should see a confirmation message
I should see social login buttons
I should see the {string} page
I should have {string} access level
I am using a mobile device
I navigate to the login page
the login form should be mobile-responsive
all elements should be easily accessible
the login process should complete within 3 seconds
I am already logged in
I logout
I should be logged out
the framework is properly initialized
I test the core functionality
all components should work without errors
no 404 errors should occur
I have a test with source mapping enabled
I run the test
source maps should be available inline
debugging should work correctly
I have feature files with step definitions
Cypress processes the features
all step definitions should be resolved
no missing step definition errors should occur
I can run a simple test
I check the configuration
the test should pass without source mapping errors
I have the Base64 protection system loaded
I try to decode invalid Base64 strings
the system should handle errors gracefully
no "invalid string length must be a multiple of 4" errors should occur

testStepResult.message:
Multiple matching step definitions for: I run the test
 I run the test
 I run the test
